languages.text: "Это лишь пустая черепная коробка мон-кай, в полость которой установлены грубые подобия бионических приборов. Абсолютно бесполезный конструкт, не способный на коммуникацию или подобие мышления. Не стану утруждать себя раздумьями о том, что именно заставило ваши примитивные мозги считать этот предмет наделенным личностью".

"It's nothing but a cranium stuffed with crude imitations of bionic devices. An utterly useless construct devoid of any ability to converse or cogitate to any extent. I will not trouble myself to ponder what exactly made your primitive minds consider this object to be endowed with a personality."
languages.original_text: "Это лишь пустая черепная коробка мон-кай, в полость которой установлены грубые подобия бионических приборов. Абсолютно бесполезный конструкт, не способный на коммуникацию или подобие мышления. Не стану утруждать себя раздумьями о том, что именно заставило ваши примитивные мозги считать этот предмет наделенным личностью".

traits.locale_text: "It's nothing but a cranium stuffed with crude imitations of bionic devices. Utterly useless construct which is devoid of any ability to communicate or cogitate to any extent. I will not trouble myself to ponder what exactly made your primitive minds consider this object to be endowed with a personality."

I will not trouble myself to ponder what exactly made your primitive minds consider this object to be endowed with a personality."

"It's nothing but a cranium stuffed with crude imitations of bionic devices. An utterly useless construct devoid of any ability to converse or cogitate to any extent. I will not trouble myself to ponder what exactly made your primitive minds consider this object to be endowed with a personality."

languages.text: "Das ist nichts als ein mit billigen Imitationen bionischer Geräte vollgestopfter Schädel. Ein absolut nutzloses Konstrukt, das weder kommunizieren, noch denken kann. Ich werde mir nicht die Mühe machen, mich zu fragen, warum genau Euer primitiver Verstand denkt, dieses Objekt hätte eine Persönlichkeit."
languages.original_text: "It's nothing but a cranium stuffed with crude imitations of bionic devices. An utterly useless construct devoid of any ability to converse or cogitate to any extent. I will not trouble myself to ponder what exactly made your primitive minds consider this object to be endowed with a personality."

traits.locale_text: "Das ist nichts als ein mit billigen Imitationen bionischer Geräte vollgestopfter Schädel. Ein absolut nutzloses Konstrukt, das weder kommunizieren, noch denken kann. Ich werde mir nicht die Mühe machen, mich zu fragen, warum genau Euer primitiver Verstand denkt, dieses Objekt hätte eine Persönlichkeit."

languages.text: « Il ne s'agit que d'un crâne bourré d'imitations grossières d'éléments bioniques. Une machine fruste, dénuée de toute capacité de conversation ou de cogitation. Mais je ne vais pas tenter de comprendre comment vos esprits grossiers ont été amenés à penser que cet objet puisse être doté d'une quelconque personnalité. »
languages.original_text: "It's nothing but a cranium stuffed with crude imitations of bionic devices. An utterly useless construct devoid of any ability to converse or cogitate to any extent. I will not trouble myself to ponder what exactly made your primitive minds consider this object to be endowed with a personality."

traits.locale_text: « Il ne s'agit que d'un crâne bourré d'imitations grossières d'éléments bioniques. Une machine fruste, dénuée de toute capacité de conversation ou de cogitation. Mais je ne vais pas tenter de comprendre comment vos esprits grossiers ont été amenés à penser que cet objet puisse être doté d'une quelconque personnalité. »

languages.text: «No es más que un cráneo lleno de imitaciones pobres de dispositivos biónicos. Un constructo totalmente inútil, desprovisto de toda capacidad de conversación y cogitación. No desperdiciaré mi tiempo preguntándome qué es lo que hizo que vuestras primitivas mentes creyeran que este objeto posee su propia personalidad».
languages.original_text: "It's nothing but a cranium stuffed with crude imitations of bionic devices. An utterly useless construct devoid of any ability to converse or cogitate to any extent. I will not trouble myself to ponder what exactly made your primitive minds consider this object to be endowed with a personality."

traits.locale_text: «No es más que un cráneo lleno de imitaciones pobres de dispositivos biónicos. Un constructo totalmente inútil, desprovisto de toda capacidad de conversación y cogitación. No desperdiciaré mi tiempo preguntándome qué es lo que hizo que vuestras primitivas mentes creyeran que este objeto posee su propia personalidad».

languages.text: "Biyonik cihazların kaba taklitleriyle doldurulmuş bir kafatasından başka bir şey değil o. Herhangi bir seviyede Konuşmalarımızın kurma veya düşünme yeteneğinden yoksun, bütünüyle işe yaramaz bir yapı. İlkel zihinlerinizin neden bu nesnenin bir kişiliğe sahip olduğunu düşündüğü üzerine düşünmekle kendimi yormayacağım."
languages.original_text: "It's nothing but a cranium stuffed with crude imitations of bionic devices. An utterly useless construct devoid of any ability to converse or cogitate to any extent. I will not trouble myself to ponder what exactly made your primitive minds consider this object to be endowed with a personality."

traits.locale_text: "Biyonik cihazların kaba taklitleriyle doldurulmuş bir kafatasından başka bir şey değil o. Herhangi bir seviyede Konuşmalarımızın kurma veya düşünme yeteneğinden yoksun, bütünüyle işe yaramaz bir yapı. İlkel zihinlerinizin neden bu nesnenin bir kişiliğe sahip olduğunu düşündüğü üzerine düşünmekle kendimi yormayacağım."

languages.text: “那不过是个塞满了粗制滥造的仿生装置的头骨。一个毫无价值的构造体，没有半点交流或思考能力。真不知道你们这些原始智能为什么会觉得这东西有人格，不过我也没兴趣去了解。”
languages.original_text: "It's nothing but a cranium stuffed with crude imitations of bionic devices. An utterly useless construct devoid of any ability to converse or cogitate to any extent. I will not trouble myself to ponder what exactly made your primitive minds consider this object to be endowed with a personality."

traits.locale_text: “那不过是个塞满了粗制滥造的仿生装置的头骨。一个毫无价值的构造体，没有半点交流或思考能力。真不知道你们这些原始智能为什么会觉得这东西有人格，不过我也没兴趣去了解。”

languages.text: 「この頭蓋骨は、粗末な模倣品で満たされているだけだ。会話や思考能力など、全くない。なぜ、この物体に人格があると考えたのか、君の原始的な頭脳が考えた理由を、私は考える気はない」
languages.original_text: "It's nothing but a cranium stuffed with crude imitations of bionic devices. An utterly useless construct devoid of any ability to converse or cogitate to any extent. I will not trouble myself to ponder what exactly made your primitive minds consider this object to be endowed with a personality."

traits.locale_text: 「この頭蓋骨は、粗末な模倣品で満たされているだけだ。会話や思考能力など、全くない。なぜ、この物体に人格があると考えたのか、君の原始的な頭脳が考えた理由を、私は考える気はない」
